title: RF elements Omnidirectional indoor dual antenna for SBX InSpot MMCX
description: This Compact Indoor Omni-Directional Dual Antenna is designed to be used with MikroTik RouterBoard RB912/RB711 when installed inside of StationBox ® InSpot. Direct connection to MMCX port of integrated radio eliminates pigtails, saves cost and decreases RF losses. Installation is super quick and easy. Antenna gain: - 2dBi (2,4GHz) - 3dBi (5GHz)
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 1 x 1 VSWR < 2,0 Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 13 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 360 Antenna type Omnidirectional Antenna gain [dBi] 2, 3 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (1) MMCX
